repo_state: local worktree pushing to local bare repository
notes: accepts thin-pack send-pack to a local bare repository, matches stock stdout and updates the remote branch to the pushed commit

combination: mirror sync heads, tags and deletions
repo_state: local worktree with heads, tags and stale remote refs

combination: two explicit branch updates with one rejected ref
repo_state: local worktree pushing to local bare repository with conflicting remote main
notes: stock Git rejects the atomic update when one ref fails; Zmin matches the non-zero failure and leaves all remote refs unchanged

repo_state: local worktree with main and feature branches
notes: stock Git reports pushed refs on stderr while Zmin exits 0 silently, even though the remote refs are updated
